main_functions.description: Allows user to create an account by providing required fields and validates input according to business rules.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that email must contain '@' and a domain, and that meaningful inline error messages are displayed for invalid format.
Verify that duplicate email addresses are rejected with a meaningful inline error message.

sub_functions.description: Validates password against complexity rules including length, character requirements, and restrictions.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that password length is between 8 and 12 characters and that meaningful inline error messages are displayed for invalid length.
Verify that password contains at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character from allowed set.
Verify that password does not contain consecutive spaces.
Verify that password does not contain the user's explicit email prefix or username.

sub_functions.description: Ensures confirm password field matches the password field.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that confirm password must match the password field, and that an error is shown if they do not match.

sub_functions.description: Validates First name field based on unspecified rules; tests for basic input acceptance and rejection of empty or excessively long values.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that First name field accepts valid input and rejects empty or excessively long values with appropriate error messages.

sub_functions.description: Validates Last name field based on unspecified rules; tests for basic input acceptance and rejection of empty or excessively long values.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that Last name field accepts valid input and rejects empty or excessively long values with appropriate error messages.

sub_functions.description: Validates phone field based on unspecified rules; tests for basic input acceptance and rejection of empty or invalid formats.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that phone field accepts valid input and rejects empty or invalid formats with appropriate error messages.

main_functions.description: Handles sending verification link, link expiration, and resend functionality.

sub_functions.description: System sends a unique verification link via email immediately after registration.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that a unique verification link is sent via email immediately after successful registration.

sub_functions.description: Verification link is valid for 24 hours.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that the verification link expires after 24 hours and cannot be used for login.

sub_functions.description: User can request a resend of the verification link every 60 seconds.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that user can request a resend only after 60 seconds have elapsed since the last request.

sub_functions.description: User must verify email before first login.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that user cannot log in for the first time until the verification link has been clicked.

main_functions.description: Handles scenarios related to account state after verification link expiration and resend request limits.

sub_functions.description: Defines system behavior when a user attempts to use an expired verification link.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that using an expired verification link results in an appropriate error message and does not allow login.

sub_functions.description: Handles maximum number of resend requests allowed.

test_categories.test_intent: Verify that the system enforces a maximum number of resend requests and displays an appropriate message when limit is reached.
